meta.question: Which document contains the top-level APS requirments imported from DORRS?
meta.finalAnswer: Based on the available model data, I could not identify a document containing top-level APS requirements specifically imported from "DORRS". While I found several documents and views related to "APS Performance Requirements" and "Key and Driving Requirements" within the TMT-APS-SE package, none of these elements show a direct dependency or import relationship with an element named "DORRS".

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have identified several APS-related elements, including documents and packages. Now I need to map the properties of these elements to find which one is linked to 'DORRS' or contains requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have mapped the properties. Now I will search for elements that have a dependency on 'DORRS' or are related to it, to find the document containing the top-level APS requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?doc ?docName ?req ?reqName WHERE {
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  ?doc vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  ?req vocab:clientDependency ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier vocab:NamedElement_name ?supplierName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?supplierName)), LCASE("DORRS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?doc ?docName ?req ?reqName ?supplierName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  ?req vocab:clientDependency ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier vocab:NamedElement_name ?supplierName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?supplierName)), LCASE("DORRS")))
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  ?doc vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
